desires: Secure a top-tier grade on the midterm to prove I can handle the workload without collapsing, even if it means sacrificing my health for another week.
Force the club social plan to be cancelled immediately so I don't have to explain why I'm too exhausted to show up; reliability is irrelevant when my GPA is at stake.
Push through this total energy crash right now by ignoring the nagging sensation of physical failure, because stopping would mean admitting defeat before the exam even starts.

goals.description: Execute final review block and submit notes by 09:00 to lock in the perfect score.
goals.rationale: The midterm is the only hard constraint that matters right now. My value system dictates that academic success outweighs social niceties or future consequences. I cannot afford a single minute of distraction; any delay risks failure, which violates my core growth goals. I am not negotiating with time—deadlines are non-negotiable.

goals.description: Cancel club social plans immediately via text so I don't have to explain why I'm too exhausted to show up.
goals.rationale: Directness wins here. Sending a blunt cancellation message to the cohort_3 now saves me from looking unreliable later. It's a quick win that aligns with my assertive nature: cut ties with obligations that don't serve my primary objective (the grade). If they push back, I'll handle it then, but clearing the schedule first is priority.

goals.description: Push through this total energy crash by ignoring the nagging sensation of physical failure.
goals.rationale: Stopping would mean admitting defeat before the exam even starts. My impulsive drive overrides the physical warning signs; I will ignore the fatigue until after the victory is secured. Health maintenance is secondary to securing the academic triumph tonight.

agent.last_reasoning: Canceling club plans is a direct win for my assertiveness and clears the schedule for the critical 09:00 deadline. I don't have time to negotiate; if they push back, I'll handle it then. This action secures my focus without compromising my primary goal of a perfect score.
